benefits.description: Helping with mitochondrial damage from H2S toxicity, though slower progress due to required mitophagy

protocol_notes: Sourced raw powder for ~$200 per 500mg. Plans to do 500mg total at 10mg/day. Believes SS-31 should be cycled, ideally once a year or every couple of years for maintenance at 100-200mg per cycle. Notes SS-31 helps bad mitochondria become more visible to the mitophagy system.
